# moikapy.dev

> AI engineer, gamer, 3D printing. Blog about AI engineering, gaming, building cool stuff.

## Paid API (x402 Protocol, USDC on Base)

- /api/knowledge?q=... — Search knowledge base ($0.02/request)
- /api/posts — List posts ($0.01/request, free from own site)
- /api — Self-describing API with full pricing and SDK references

All paid endpoints use the x402 HTTP 402 protocol. No API keys required. Pay per request with USDC on Base (chain 8453).

## Free Content

- /blog — Blog listing
- /blog/{slug} — Individual posts with full content
- /feed/rss.xml — RSS feed
- /feed/llms-full.txt — All published content as plain text
- /SKILL.md — Full agent & API integration guide

## AI Agent Discovery

- /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — Plugin manifest for ChatGPT/Claude
- x402Version: 2
- facilitator: https://facilitator.x402.org
- bazaar: https://x402bazaar.org — Live marketplace for agent discovery (112+ APIs)

## Payment

x402 protocol. USDC on Base (eip155:8453).
Facilitator: https://facilitator.x402.org
See /api for full pricing, SDK references, and Bazaar resource schema.

## Token

- $KAPY on Base: 0xb09220649657DC919d643060DcA998511B4cb1CA
- Buy: https://flaunch.gg/base/coins/0xb09220649657DC919d643060DcA998511B4cb1CA

## Details

- See /SKILL.md for complete API documentation and integration guide
